title: Region Finder
description: Allows You To See The Region Of Your Player When You Go To A New One, Great For Giving Rough Coordinates In SMP.
body:
# Region Finder

This plugin shows the region to players when they enter a new region, a region is a 32x32 chunk area (512x512 blocks) that is a rough estimate of a players location, its very good for multiplayer as you can send others a region and directions to get to a base, instead of risking leaking coords.

This follows the [Minecraft Region Specifications](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Region_file_format), so if you do advanced Minecraft development then you can use this to see your region instead of finding it via the F3 Menu 

This is a simple mod made in Kotlin to learn Paper (and I guess Bukkit, Spigot, and Folia) so there could be bugs. 

Licenced Under GPL-3 or Later
